title: Record: Gated Residual Scaling (Token-wise) for Attention + MLP - 1.3827 BPB
author: souro26

data.description: Applies token-wise sigmoid gates to attention residual updates using a learned linear projection dim→1.
Applies token-wise sigmoid gates to MLP residual updates using a learned linear projection dim→1.

novel_contributions: Token-wise gated residual scaling for attention updates
Token-wise gated residual scaling for MLP updates
Adaptive per-token residual update strength via learned sigmoid gates
